text: {"extracted_facts": {"Student": "Ahmad bin Ali", "Matric No": "WIA200123", "Faculty": "FSKTM", "Programme": "Software Engineering", "Year": 3, "CGPA": 3.50, "Company": "TechCorp Sdn Bhd", "Company Address": "Level 5, Menara TechCorp, Jalan Raja Chulan, 50200 Kuala Lumpur", "Placement Period": "2026-07-01 to 2026-12-31", "Industry Supervisor": "Ms. Lim Wei Ling (weiling.lim@techcorp.com.my)", "Family-Owned": "No"}, "flags": [{"severity": "info", "message": "First-time placement applicant — workshop attendance confirmed."}, {"severity": "info", "message": "Company TechCorp Sdn Bhd is on the SERU CoR approved-organisation list."}], "recommendation": "approve", "reasoning": "Student meets all eligibility criteria — CGPA 3.50 exceeds the 3.30 FSKTM floor; pre-IT workshop attended; company verified in CoR list; family-owned conflict-of-interest check passed (clarified during workflow). Offer letter parsed cleanly with high confidence on all required fields. No issues warranting rejection or further information requests. Approve placement and confirm via online system within 48-hour SLA."}
